name.value: When you buy coffee in bulk, it’s easy for your coffee supplier to justify lowering the quality of your product. But we don’t take shortcuts when it comes to roasting coffee beans; we’re committed to roasting each and every bean to its full potential. We fresh roast, carefully package, and ship our bulk artisan coffees with a strict focus on maximizing their fresh flavor for you and your customers.

We fresh roast, carefully package, and ship our bulk artisan coffees with a strict focus on maximizing their fresh flavor for you and your customers.

name.value: CRAFT ROASTED TO ORDER FROM MINNESOTA

name.value: Due North Coffee Co. is a first of its kind drive-thru coffee trailer built to resemble a Minnesota Ice House. We strive to provide local fresh products and the best we could find in our beautiful home state. After meeting and touring multiple coffee roasters, we decided Driven was the best fit for our brand and produced the best coffee we had sampled. Driven consulted with us on equipment and layout for our unique space and when we were ready to open provided training for our baristas. From start to finish, they are an exceptional company to work with! The people, the coffee, the customer service all go above and beyond our expectations.

value.value: Due North Coffee Co. is a first of its kind drive-thru coffee trailer built to resemble a Minnesota Ice House. We strive to provide local fresh products and the best we could find in our beautiful home state. After meeting and touring multiple coffee roasters, we decided Driven was the best fit for our brand and produced the best coffee we had sampled. Driven consulted with us on equipment and layout for our unique space and when we were ready to open provided training for our baristas. From start to finish, they are an exceptional company to work with! The people, the coffee, the customer service all go above and beyond our expectations.

name.value: Working with Driven for our Coffee Cart Initiative has been incredible. From our initial coffee tasting meeting, that was arguably a little too fun for an average workday, to the Driven team checking and calibrating our machines, to easy and efficient ordering and delivery, it has been an amazing experience. They go above and beyond with their customer service. And the coffee matches their service in every respect. It checked off every criterion we had for choosing a coffee: delicious, smooth, sustainable and a great variety of roasts. We are officially obsessed.

value.value: Working with Driven for our Coffee Cart Initiative has been incredible. From our initial coffee tasting meeting, that was arguably a little too fun for an average workday, to the Driven team checking and calibrating our machines, to easy and efficient ordering and delivery, it has been an amazing experience. They go above and beyond with their customer service. And the coffee matches their service in every respect. It checked off every criterion we had for choosing a coffee: delicious, smooth, sustainable and a great variety of roasts. We are officially obsessed.

name.value: We absolutely love working with our sales rep Erin and Driven Coffee!  I had been looking for a local coffee roaster, to provide whole beans for our beers, with unique products, fast delivery and great customer service.  Driven checks all those boxes and more!  We couldn’t be happier with the product and service, top notch!

value.value: We absolutely love working with our sales rep Erin and Driven Coffee!  I had been looking for a local coffee roaster, to provide whole beans for our beers, with unique products, fast delivery and great customer service.  Driven checks all those boxes and more!  We couldn’t be happier with the product and service, top notch!

name.value: Tim and Tom’s Speedy Market is a family-owned grocery store in the St Anthony Park Neighborhood of St. Paul. Tim and Tom’s offers local and internationally sourced products as well as fresh produce, fresh meat and deli, and specialty cheeses. Working with Driven Coffee has been a pleasure. They adapt to meet our needs, and market their products in a way that makes it unique to our store. Instead of feeling like our customers are buying from a national brand, they form a unique relationship with Driven and know they are supporting local business. Not only does Driven offer a high-quality coffee, but they have also been a superior partner in the coffee aisle.

value.value: Tim and Tom’s Speedy Market is a family-owned grocery store in the St Anthony Park Neighborhood of St. Paul. Tim and Tom’s offers local and internationally sourced products as well as fresh produce, fresh meat and deli, and specialty cheeses. Working with Driven Coffee has been a pleasure. They adapt to meet our needs, and market their products in a way that makes it unique to our store. Instead of feeling like our customers are buying from a national brand, they form a unique relationship with Driven and know they are supporting local business.
